title: RootStore
description: RootStore schema from Asset Graph API

chains.description: A path of trusted signing certificates up to a root certificate present in a root store, represented as an ordered list of SHA-256 fingerprints.

ever_valid.description: Whether the certificate has ever been considered valid by the root store.

had_trusted_path.description: Whether there ever existed a trusted path of signing certificates from a certificate present in the root certificate store.

has_trusted_path.description: Whether there currently exists a trusted path of signing certificates from a certificate present in the root certificate store.

in_revocation_set.description: Whether the certificate is in the revocation set (e.g. OneCRL) associated with the root store.

is_valid.description: Whether the certificate is currently considered valid by the root store: a summary of the trust path, revoked, blocklisted/allowlisted, and expired fields.

parents.description: The SHA-256 fingerprints of the certificate's immediate parents in its trust path(s).

type.description: The certificate's type. Options include root, intermediate, or leaf.
